name: screenshot-vision-gate-fragment
description: Takes a desktop screenshot, asks the reasoning backend to evaluate a visual condition, and sets vision_gate_passed (yes/no string) in context. Required context var: vision_question. Optional: display_index (integer, 0-based), screenshot_export_path.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

params.instruction: Look at the screenshot at path '{{screenshot_path}}' and answer the following question with ONLY 'yes' or 'no': {{vision_question}}
